app.title: PyDeepSeek TUI
app.confirm.title: Confirmation required
app.confirm.body: The agent wants to run '{tool}' with args: {args}
app.confirm.hint: Switch to YOLO mode (Ctrl+M) to run without confirmations.
cli.key_needed: To use PyDeepSeek TUI with {provider}, you need an API key.
cli.key_saved: API key encrypted and saved successfully!
cli.error.provider: Check the IA_PROVIDER setting in the .env file or set the appropriate API key.
error.api_key_missing: API key not found in settings.
agent.history_trimmed: Note: Conversation history was trimmed to maintain performance.
agent.blocked.plan: Blocked by 'plan' mode: '{tool}' is destructive. Plan mode only allows read-only tools.

error.security.outside_dir: Security error: The path is outside the working directory.
error.file.exists: File '{path}' already exists. To overwrite, call the tool again with overwrite=true.
